title: ChineseCoreBuilding
description: Add street views that can be seen everywhere in everyday life to the game!
body:
# A purely cosmetic mod

This mod is designed to add road features that can be found everywhere in everyday life to the game.

![Street View Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HjOlNIBx/images/1b87c1977f7ad3c605ff38d0926643f9b5703083_350.webp)

## Note

* Blocks added to mods cannot be obtained in Survival Mode(Perhaps the corresponding formula will be added in the future...)
* The mod content is not perfect at present,More content will be added in the future.
